TunnelBox is a Hardware Gateway To Expose Your Local Servers & AI Models Publicly A dedicated hardware gateway that connects your local application to the public internet with all the hard stuff taken care of in one box.
View On Kickstarter
Expose Local Servers

Put Your Local App on A Public URL

Localhost
🤖AI Local Model
🔗Services
💻Local App
Tunnel Stack
TunnelBox
Servers
🌐Public URL
Why a hardware solution?

Developers should focus on what they love: building. A hardware ingress puts everything you need into one box. So, no need for complex network configurations or other headaches to get your local applications to the public.

  • Handles port forwarding automatically, so you don’t touch router rules.
  • Keeps local development private by default, exposing only what you choose.
  • Centralizes routing for multiple devices in one place.
  • Makes webhook testing reliable without tunneling setup every session.
  • Lowers misconfiguration risk compared to manual network setup.
The features that make tunneling simplier

Tunnelbox offers an array of services in connecting your services to the world.

Plug & Play

Plug it into power and your router, complete a quick setup, and you’re live. No network configurations. Get your services up and running for the public to see.

Zero Touch Setup

No need to touch your router. Once the Box is plugged in and setup, your local application is exposed to the public.

Automatic SSL / TLS

Every domain comes with HTTPS out of the box. Certificates are issued and renewed automatically.

Built for Developers

Designed for developers shipping fast. Expose localhost for webhooks and APIs, share live demos, deploy staging environments, or publish AI inference endpoints in seconds.

One Box To Connect Multiple Machines

Expose multiple local services from a single TunnelBox. Route traffic to different ports, containers, or services without additional hardware

Regular Updates

Security patches, firmware upgrades, and new features are delivered keeping your gateway secure and optimized.

One Year of Free Subscription

Every device includes one year of TunnelBox service — including managed domains, SSL, and updates.

Free Managed Domains

Depending on your subscription, create multiple public domains per port.

End-to-End Encryption

All traffic is encrypted between TunnelBox and end user.

Easily Control Where Your Traffic Goes

Expose local LLMs, inference servers, or edge AI systems as production-ready HTTPS endpoints.

Who is Tunnelbox for?
Hobbyists & Students
Developers
Teams & Startups
